entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` TEXT NOT NULL, `type` TEXT NOT NULL, `payload` TEXT NOT NULL, `timestamp` INTEGER NOT NULL, `priority` INTEGER NOT NULL, `status` INTEGER NOT NULL, `retryCount` INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`id`))

indices.name: index_events_status
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_events_status` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`status`)

indices.name: index_events_priority
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_events_priority` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`priority`)

indices.name: index_events_timestamp
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_events_timestamp` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`timestamp`)
